text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It involves text understanding, where machines read and interpret the meaning of words and sentences. For example, NLP powers translation tools that convert text from one language to another. It also performs sentiment analysis, which detects emotions in written content, such as whether a product review is positive or negative. Additionally, chatbots use NLP to have conversations with users, answering questions and providing assistance. From auto-correct to virtual assistants, NLP makes technology more useful and natural for everyday communication.
